title: Enigma Benchmark
description:
Internal leaderboard for the Enigma Project to compare different neural prediction approaches.

Og codabench docker image: codalab/codalab-legacy:py39
My codabench docker image with zarr support: jkbhagatio/codabench:py39-zarr
description_zh:
谜题项目内部排行榜，用于比较不同的神经预测方法。

原始codabench docker镜像：codalab/codalab-legacy:py39
我的具有zarr支持的codabench docker镜像：jkbhagatio/codabench:py39-zarr

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Enigma Codabench Competition

This competition is for internal evaluation of models on acquired datasets.

The goal for this competition phase is to predict actual neural responses given video and gaze data from each of four Macaque fixed-gaze recording sessions.

To participate: 1. Sign up for a free Codabench account. 2. Join our competition here. 3. Submit predictions and add to leaderboard.

Starter notebooks in the "jb-update-for-codabench" branch of the monkey-baselines repo provide a walkthrough of toy examples of model training and model inference on the Codabench datasets, as well as submitting model predictions to the Codabench site. To view these, please request access to the repository from Konstantin or Federico.
pages.content_zh:
Enigma Codabench竞赛

本竞赛用于在获得的数据集上对模型进行内部评估。

本竞赛阶段的目标是在给定来自四个猕猴固定注视记录会话的视频和眼动数据的条件下，预测实际的神经反应。

参与步骤： 1. 注册免费的Codabench账户。 2. 从此处加入我们的竞赛。 3. 提交预测结果并添加到排行榜。

monkey-baselines仓库"jb-update-for-codabench"分支中的入门笔记本 提供了模型训练和在Codabench数据集上进行模型推理的玩具示例演练，以及向Codabench网站提交模型预测的相关内容。如需查看这些内容，请向Konstantin或Federico请求仓库访问权限。
